who: HR administrators in small to medium-sized businesses using Gusto for employee benefits management
offer: For HR administrators in small to medium-sized businesses processing 5–15 employee benefits enrollments/month, manual tracking causes compliance issues. We streamline enrollment and compliance instead of manual tracking and spreadsheets.
problem: Managing employee benefits enrollment and compliance efficiently
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for HR administrators seeking help
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to HR administrators with demo video
Community groups sharing tools for HR management
try_it: Let users try user-friendly interface and compliance dashboard on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as templates for quick access
Set default reminder schedules for users
Allow CSV import for existing employee data
Enable one-click export of compliance reports
Reduce steps required in onboarding process
